intro: Sivakumar Dhanasekar leads enterprise software delivery at the intersection of identity, fraud, cloud modernization, and applied AI. His leadership work combines hands-on architecture with product ownership: translating business risk into secure platforms, shaping roadmaps, mentoring distributed teams, and guiding Java/Spring Boot, API, Kubernetes, GCP, and AWS delivery across high-trust financial technology and retail environments.

engagements.title: Lead Developer and Product Owner, Identity and Fraud Services
engagements.description: Leads platform delivery for identity and fraud services, including AI-enabled verification, device reputation, fraud risk scoring, trust scoring, API orchestration, secure coding governance, backlog prioritization, and GCP-based microservices architecture.

engagements.title: Lead Developer, Cloud Migration and Application Modernization
engagements.description: Directed distributed engineering teams through modernization of legacy applications into secure cloud-ready platforms, remediating large-scale vulnerabilities and guiding architecture, design reviews, AWS deployment patterns, Docker, Jenkins, Java, Spring, Hibernate, and REST API delivery.

engagements.title: Team Lead, Special Services Order Maintenance
engagements.description: Led a 20-person offshore team as application SPOC, shaping technical design, delivery planning, testing strategy, stakeholder reporting, Agile execution, and reusable REST API implementation for in-store order maintenance systems.

engagements.title: Senior Java Developer and Technical Delivery Lead
engagements.description: Provided technical leadership across retail pricing, distribution forecasting, replenishment, and supply-chain visibility platforms, producing design documents, implementing Java/J2EE systems, supporting QA cycles, performance testing, and production deployment.

engagements.title: QA and Test Leadership
engagements.description: Led and supported quality engineering for inventory planning and distribution network applications, covering requirements analysis, test strategy, defect tracking, automated API testing, service virtualization, and practical quality improvements for enterprise retail workflows.
